gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands straight, opens both arms wide with a smile, and leans slightly forward while announcing the topic
a person tilts their head slightly and raises both hands beside their face, inviting responses from the audience
a tutor motions with one hand, showing a visual group form as they explain adding two sets together
a person steps to the side, using both hands to illustrate two distinct groups while engaging the students
a tutor crouches slightly, leans closer, and gestures with their fingers, encouraging counting along with enthusiasm
a person stands tall, claps their hands lightly together while posing the question, energizing the students to think
a tutor raises both arms above their head with excitement, encouraging the class to celebrate their answers together
a person waves their arms gently in front of them, smiling widely as they acknowledge the students' efforts joyfully
a tutor takes a step back, spreads their arms wide, and gestures as if pulling numbers together in a warm, inviting way
